topic: OECD middle-class inequality after COVID-19, with emphasis on wage and consumption inequality within the middle class.
hypothesis: Did the COVID-19 period increase inequality within the middle class in OECD countries by pushing previously middle-class households toward lower- and higher-income segments, with especially visible increases in wage and consumption inequality?
title: Did COVID-19 Hollow Out the Middle Class? Wage and Consumption Inequality Within the OECD Middle Class After the Pandemic
